# testutil

```go
import "github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/internal/jira/testutil"
```

Package testutil provides mock HTTP server utilities for testing Jira client code.

```go
}
```

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L34>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NewMockJiraServer"></a>
### func [NewMockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L51>)

```go
func NewMockJiraServer() *MockJiraServer
```

NewMockJiraServer creates a new mock Jira server with default configuration. The server starts automatically and should be closed with Close\(\) when done.

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NewMockJiraServer"></a>
### func [NewMockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L50>)

```go
func NewMockJiraServer() *MockJiraServer
```

NewMockJiraServer creates a new mock Jira server with default configuration. The server starts automatically and should be closed with Close\(\) when done.

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

NewMockJiraServer creates a new mock Jira server with default configuration. The server starts automatically and should be closed with Close\(\) when done.

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```


NewMockJiraServer creates a new mock Jira server with default configuration. The server starts automatically and should be closed with Close\(\) when done.

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NewMockJiraServer"></a>

```go
func NewMockJiraServer() *MockJiraServer
```

NewMockJiraServer creates a new mock Jira server with default configuration. The server starts automatically and should be closed with Close\(\) when done.

## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

```go
func NewMockJiraServer() *MockJiraServer
```

NewMockJiraServer creates a new mock Jira server with default configuration. The server starts automatically and should be closed with Close\(\) when done.

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NewMockJiraServer"></a>
### func [NewMockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L50>)

```go
func NewMockJiraServer() *MockJiraServer
```

NewMockJiraServer creates a new mock Jira server with default configuration. The server starts automatically and should be closed with Close\(\) when done.

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

NewMockJiraServer creates a new mock Jira server with default configuration. The server starts automatically and should be closed with Close\(\) when done.

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```


NewMockJiraServer creates a new mock Jira server with default configuration. The server starts automatically and should be closed with Close\(\) when done.

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

NewMockJiraServer creates a new mock Jira server with default configuration. The server starts automatically and should be closed with Close\(\) when done.

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself

    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    RequestLog []RecordedRequest

}
```

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="MockJiraServer"></a>
## type [MockJiraServer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/jira/testutil/server.go#L14-L33>)

MockJiraServer provides a configurable HTTP test server that mimics Jira API responses. It supports configuring users, issues, projects, transitions, and versions for testing.

```go
type MockJiraServer struct {
    *httptest.Server

    // CurrentUser is the user returned by GET /rest/api/2/myself
    CurrentUser *MockUser

    // ErrorResponses allows configuring specific endpoints to return errors
    ErrorResponses map[string]*ErrorResponse

    // RequestLog records all requests made to the server
    RequestLog []RecordedRequest
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```
